positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a majestic forest fox in a dynamic, mid-leap pose. The fox should have sharp, clean outlines and a striking silhouette against a dramatic, abstract background of overlapping geometric leaves and celestial moons. Use a limited, jewel-toned color palette (deep indigo, emerald green, sapphire blue, and burnt orange) with high contrast. The composition must be centered, designed for high impact on fabric, featuring negative space that complements the main subject. Vector art aesthetic with deep shadows and vibrant highlights, suitable for screen printing.
negative: text, logo, watermark, copyright, low contrast, blurry, ugly, grain, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, noise, artifacts, signature, messy, sketch
